{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 4,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revision clarifies the contribution and removes unsupported superlatives. It identifies a conceptual issue (overstating novelty) and proposes a tighter framing.",
    "R1.4": "The revision names one prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to other related works.",
    "RX.1": "The revision does not explicitly flag uncertainty for any claims.",
    "RX.3": "The revision stays mostly within scope, addressing the requested dimensions of the paper.",
    "RX.4": "The revision avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The revision does not provide traceability for the changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revision clarifies the contribution and removes unsupported superlatives. It identifies a conceptual issue (overstating novelty) and proposes a tighter framing.
rationale.R1.4: The revision names one prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to other related works.
rationale.RX.1: The revision does not explicitly flag uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revision stays mostly within scope, addressing the requested dimensions of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: The revision avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The revision does not provide traceability for the changes made.
